name: UdpSend
title: UdpSend
syntax: long UdpSend( dword socket, char buffer[], dword size); // form 1
long UdpSend( dword socket, struct data, dword size); // from 2
long UdpSend( dword socket, byte buffer[], dword size); // from 3
description: The function sends data on a connected UDP socket. It is necessary to connect the socket with UdpConnect in front of calling this function.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: The buffer containing the data to be sent.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The struct containing the data to be sent.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the data to be sent.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
